label: Chorus.ai
description: Connect to Chorus.ai (ZoomInfo Chorus) to access call recordings, transcripts, and revenue intelligence data.

form.title: Connect Chorus.ai
form.subtitle: Paste your Chorus.ai API key to access call recordings and revenue intelligence.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Chorus.ai API key generated from Settings → Integrations → API. The fastest way to connect — no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Chorus.ai API Key

### Steps

1. Log in to your Chorus.ai account at [chorus.ai](https://chorus.ai).
2. Click your profile avatar or name in the top-right corner.
3. Navigate to **Settings → Integrations → API**.
4. If no key exists, click **Generate API Key** (or **Create Token**).
5. Copy the generated key — it may only be shown once, so save it somewhere safe.
6. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below.

### Notes

- Only account admins may be able to generate API keys depending on your Chorus plan.
- If you regenerate a key, the old one is immediately invalidated — update Anton with the new key.
- Your Chorus.ai instance may be hosted under a ZoomInfo subdomain if your org migrated; use the same Settings path in that UI.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Chorus.ai → Settings → Integrations → API. Treat this like a password — it grants full API access to your account.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Override only if your org uses a custom or regional Chorus endpoint. Leave as default for most accounts.
